work.name: AGEDI System
work.desc: Enterprise management platform for AGEDI. Business logic, dashboards and reporting with Power BI.
work.long_desc: Full-stack enterprise management platform built with C# / .NET and SQL Server. Includes Azure Data Studio integration, Power BI dashboards for reporting, and a web frontend. Maintained and improved with new features following agile methodologies.

work.name: Sisley System
work.desc: Web application and backend for Sisley content management using MVC architecture.
work.long_desc: Content management system built with C# / .NET following the MVC pattern, backed by SQL Server and deployed on Azure. Responsible for feature development and continuous maintenance of both frontend and backend layers.

work.name: Iberext System
work.desc: Android mobile app for fire prevention systems management, migrated from a legacy Windows tablet version.
work.long_desc: Built from scratch in Kotlin with Jetpack Compose, migrating and extending an existing Windows tablet application. Connects to a C# / .NET + SQL Server backend. Implements multimodular clean architecture with Firebase integration.

work.name: EPDM – Music Portal
work.desc: Android mobile app for managing music content with rights controlled by AGEDI. Published on Play Store.
work.long_desc: Native Android app built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose for the AGEDI Music Portal. Manages protected music content, playback and user rights. Backend powered by C# / .NET and SQL Server with Firebase for real-time features. Published on Google Play Store.

featured.name: YouKnow
featured.desc: Android social network app for educational games and chat with full gamification system.
featured.long_desc: Bachelor's final project. Full-featured Android app integrating real-time Firebase Firestore, Auth and Storage. Users create study groups, challenge friends to quizzes, earn XP points and climb leaderboards. Built with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose and MVVM/MVI architecture.

featured.name: Local VPS Orchestrator
featured.desc: REST API to orchestrate local VPS resources: metrics, automation and service management on Linux.
featured.long_desc: Built for the AI Development Master's. A Node.js + Express + TypeScript REST API that monitors CPU, memory and disk metrics, manages Docker containers and schedules automated tasks. Persists data in MongoDB and is fully containerised with Docker Compose.

featured.name: Personal Portfolio
featured.desc: This portfolio (previous version): Astro + Node.js, deployed on a self-hosted VPS with CI/CD and automated tests.
featured.long_desc: Multi-language Astro website with 14 supported locales. Deployed on a self-hosted VPS with Docker Compose, Nginx Proxy Manager, automated Playwright e2e tests and Vitest unit tests. Includes CI/CD with error recognition and automatic deployment on push.

featured.name: Codewars Katas
featured.desc: Repository with solutions to Codewars katas in multiple languages: Kotlin, C#, Java, JavaScript, Python, Bash…
featured.long_desc: Ongoing personal repo focused on sharpening algorithmic thinking. Covers sorting, dynamic programming, graph traversal, string manipulation and more across Kotlin, C#, Java, JavaScript, Python, Bash and TypeScript.
